description: One independent reviewer's verdict on a unit's dev work product. Reviewers run in distinct sessions with no shared context beyond the unit inputs and the dev output.

verdict.description: `pass` if the work product meets the goal; `blockers` if it has blocking defects.

blockers.description: Blocking defects with location evidence. MUST be empty when verdict is `pass`; MUST be non-empty when verdict is `blockers`.

file.description: Where the defect is. Cite the work-product location; use `work_product` when the deliverable is inline text.

line.description: 1-based line within the cited location the defect points at.

issue.description: The blocking problem and what must change.
